name: Warm Ambrosia
recipeInstructions:
1. Section the oranges and grapefruit by cutting a slice from the top, then peeling off the rind in strips from top to bottom, cutting deep enough to remove the white membrane. Next, cut a slice from the bottom. Peel the remaining rind around the fruit in a spiral fashion. Go over the fruit again, removing any remaining white membranes. Cut along the side of each dividing membrane from the outside toward the center of the core. Remove each section by peeling it into the bowl to retain the juice.
2. In a small saucepan, mix the sugar and cornstarch. Stir in the water and grapefruit juice. Heat over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Simmer for 1 minute.
3. Add the fruit sections to the hot sauce. Peel the bananas and cut into diagonal slices. Add the banana slices to the sauce and serve warm.
